blended.narrative: Okemo is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 54°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: light freezing drizzle, highs of 52°F.
Friday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
